title: guestfs-tools bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.54.0-3]
- Rebase to guestfs-tools 1.54.0
  resolves: RHEL-81734
- virt-builder, virt-v2v & other tools with -v and --install causes dnf5 error
  resolves: RHEL-83201
- virt-drivers fails on opensuse guest if kernel-source is installed
  resolves: RHEL-92604
- builder: Update link to templates to use https
  resolves: RHEL-94873
- Fix SELinux relabelling in Linux split-/usr
  resolves: RHEL-109129
full_text:
[1.54.0-3]
- Rebase to guestfs-tools 1.54.0
  resolves: RHEL-81734
- virt-builder, virt-v2v & other tools with -v and --install causes dnf5 error
  resolves: RHEL-83201
- virt-drivers fails on opensuse guest if kernel-source is installed
  resolves: RHEL-92604
- builder: Update link to templates to use https
  resolves: RHEL-94873
- Fix SELinux relabelling in Linux split-/usr
  resolves: RHEL-109129

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20398-0.html
